---
title: DataViz
date: '2026-03-16'
description: A Plotly Gallery of Data Visualization
categories:
- Data Visualization
featured: true
icon: chart-dots
---

[View Gallery](https://noahweidig.com/dataviz/){.nw-btn .nw-btn-primary target="_blank"}

A gallery of Plotly visualizations exploring various approaches to displaying and analyzing data. Demonstrates interactive charts, statistical plots, and custom visualization techniques.
